steps.title: Use the photograph context
steps.content: The sentence says the photograph featured a portrait of Great-Great-Grandmother Rosita. In this context, the word describes what the photograph contained or showed.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Choice B means asked about, Choice C means accepted or endorsed, and Choice D means paid no attention to. None describes what a photograph does with a portrait. The closest meaning is displayed. The answer is A.
